purpose: Integration/e2e verification story (FR-A7): drives the full returning-user invite-link awaiting-confirmation flow through the running app (Playwright, publish-via-app only, never raw WebSocket) against the REAL, already-landed S1-S4 implementations. Verifies AC-E2E-1..4 (land -> Invited banner -> confirm -> Awaiting banner+card -> persists across reload -> Cancel removes live -> admin approval -> card disappears/real group appears live) and the cross-cutting AC-OBS-1..3 whole-flow ordering guarantees (async-load-vs-delete no-resurrection, atomic no-both/no-neither auto-accept transition, cancel-then-later-approval falls through to manual Accept/Decline). Owns no production module and no data; it is a verification harness only.
dependencies_allowed: i18n copy (app/src/lib/i18n.ts, consumed transitively via rendered UI, no direct import)
dependencies_forbidden: No production-code edits of any kind (test-only story, FR-A4)
No raw WebSocket publish to the relay for admin/invitee actions
No mocking of S2/S3/S4's real implementations
external_ports: Playwright browser automation against the running dev server
strfry relay (Docker, via docker-compose.e2e.yml / make e2e-up)
blossom-mock (Docker, unused directly by this spec but part of the shared e2e stack)
